mapper.sql: s.id AS station_id, s.company_id, s.name AS station_name, s.status, s.load_base_kw, s.capacity_kwp, s.sort_index, c.biz_date, c.time_slot, c.load_kw, c.pv_output_kw, c.forecast_day_ahead_kw, c.forecast_ultra_short_kw
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM sa_station_curve_15m c JOIN sa_station s ON s.id = c.station_id WHERE c.biz_date = #{bizDate} ORDER BY s.sort_index, c.time_slot
